case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. BYRON GILBERTO ESPINOZA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,037.60 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, BYRON GILBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, BYRON GILBERTO $2,037.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,177.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR.
